payment_alerts_desc: Get notified for transactions and fund releases

hero_description: A platform that digitizes job creation. Create project requirement documents across industries, match with the right talent, and manage execution from start to finish.
hero_card_ai: Get cost and team estimates straight from your brief.
hero_card_talent: Verified talent that went through a curation process.
hero_card_match: Automatic matching based on required skills.
hero_card_escrow: Funds held in escrow until work is approved.
how_subtitle: Three steps from idea to result. The platform handles the technical process so you can focus on your business goals.
flow_submit_desc: Fill in your brief and budget estimate.
flow_chat_desc: AI helps clarify your project needs.
flow_brd_desc: BRD and PRD documents created automatically.
flow_recommend_desc: Matching projects are offered to you directly.
testimonial_quote: From scoping to delivery, everything was structured. The talent we got through this platform was highly competent and communication was smooth.
cta_description: Submit your project and let the platform help from planning to execution.
footer_desc: A managed marketplace platform for cross-industry projects in Indonesia. Digitizing job creation by connecting project owners with curated talent through a structured process.
dashboard_subtitle: Summary of your activity and projects
quick_action_submit_desc: Create a new project with AI assistance
about_hero_desc: KerjaCUS! is a managed marketplace for cross-industry projects in Indonesia. We digitize job creation by connecting project owners from any field with the right talent, through a structured process from planning to execution.
about_ai_desc: AI helps create project requirement documents (BRD/PRD) from a short brief, including cost estimates and team requirements.
about_match_desc: The matching system connects projects with talent based on skills, experience, and availability. All talent goes through a verification process.
about_secure_desc: Funds are safe in escrow and only released after milestones are approved. Payment process is transparent for both parties.
about_tech_brd_desc: AI analyzes project requirements and generates technical documents automatically, including system architecture and task breakdown.
about_tech_cv_desc: CV documents are parsed automatically to extract skills and experience. Data is matched with available project requirements.
about_tech_matching_desc: The matching algorithm considers skill compatibility, track record, availability, and project distribution fairness for all talent.
about_tech_escrow_desc: Automatic escrow system holds funds until work is approved. Auto-release after 14 days if the project owner doesn't respond.
about_footer_note: KerjaCUS! supports cross-industry projects: software development, design, data/AI, civil engineering, geodesy, environmental science, business consulting, accounting, and more. The platform digitizes job creation across Indonesia.
